title: centaurea rupestris subsp. parnonia
intro: Centaurea rupestris subsp. parnonia is a subspecies of the mountain cornflower plant, known for its vibrant blue flowers and ability to thrive in dry, rocky areas. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea rupestris subsp. parnonia include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
